purpose: Standardised realm-region registry per BUILDING-BLOCKS.md §III. The cathedral's canon, surveyed, projects into ten distinguishable realm-region classes. This registry makes the typology authoritative (rather than heuristic) and queryable. Each entry articulates one region's character, the typical suffix-family signatures that project into it, and exemplar canon-members.

schema.description: the region's character — what kind of realm-content it covers
schema.typical_signatures: suffix-families and/or tier-registers that typically project into this region
schema.donor_class_hints: if region depends on donor-class within a family, the heuristic clues
schema.forge_status: thin | moderate | dense — how thoroughly the cathedral has projected into this region

regions.description: The Ground itself — THEOBASIS-naming; the foundational realm-locus on which all other regions rest
regions.forge_status: thin (near-closed by structural-necessity; the Ground is one)
regions.notes: The deepest realm-region. The basis-family is near-closed because the Ground does not admit multiplication. Future members would name sub-foundations of THEOBASIS-aspects.

regions.description: What GoD is/does — cosmic-quality manifested as divine; the realm-region of GoD's own properties
regions.donor_class_hints: cosmic-quality donors: maat, ma'at, rta, ṛta, rita, asha, aša, emet, kittu, aletheia, alētheia, brahman, dharma, tao, haqq, logos
regions.notes: The cosmic-truth-order convergence (convergences/cosmic-truth-order.md) anchors this region. Six-tradition convergence on a single realm-region; four currently forged (maatme, rtame, ashame, emetme); two pending (kittume, aletheme).

regions.description: The creature-receiving of divine-given content; what arrives from beyond the self as ordinance
regions.donor_class_hints: creature-relational donors: ki, šēmu/shem, doxa, hotep, agape, ahava, bhakti, ihsan, tapas, mahabbah, dana, xenia, nommo, etc.
regions.notes: The cathedral's largest realm-region. The -me suffix's predominant projection-aspect when the donor is creature-relational rather than cosmic-quality.

regions.description: Relational-emotion as bond-quality; the felt aspect of being-in-relation
regions.notes: Mandarin qing names this realm-region precisely. The qing-family is open and growing as new relational-emotion regions are reached. Distinct from bond-substance (-kin) which names what the bond IS rather than how it FEELS.

regions.description: Posture and orientation of the creature; how a person STANDS toward what is
regions.notes: Latin -antia. Many creature-stances; the cathedral's foundational-stance trinity is kimance (attentive-here-ness), panimaance (face-present), oriance (alignment).

regions.description: Performed liturgical acts; what creatures DO in worship
regions.notes: The worship-action tier (canon/worship-action/) uses the -ance suffix in worship-action register, distinct from Core tier state-quality. High-arity multi-tradition compounds typical (4-5 donors). Each entry compresses a cross-tradition convergence on one performed worship-act.

regions.description: Recognition-moments; events of grasping-arrival; the joy-of-evidence-confirmed-truth
regions.notes: The phenomenology of grasping (GRASPING.md) is the experience-side of this region. Recognition-events are what the cathedral has been able to name partially; further forging awaits.

regions.description: Aesthetic encounter; the realm-region of beholding GoD's beauty and the response it elicits
regions.notes: The Standing Liturgy (METHOD.md §Running the Liturgy) is the cathedral's permanent forge-thread reaching for the word for GoD's beauty. Dyad detected (doxalgia + orthophanes); community escalation in progress (recognition-moment, altered-beholder, indelibility-of-trace, shared-witness pending).

regions.description: Reflexive cathedral-internal vocabulary; words ABOUT the cathedral's own work (diplosemy, dokimance, anastrophance, etc.)
regions.notes: The grammars/diplosemy chapter contributes most members. These are the cathedral's vocabulary for its own structural operations — meta-craft naming.

regions.description: What the bond IS (as substance, not as feeling) — the relational-class itself
regions.notes: Distinct from felt-bond (qing). Where qing names the bond's felt-emotional aspect, kin names the bond's substantive-class. walkekin = the friendship-class whose substance is duration-tolerance; tacitkin = the bond-class whose substance is non-verbal-knowing.

forge_territory_proposed_per_BUILDING_BL.description: Realm-regions distinguishing instantaneous-realization from sustained-state from cyclical-recurrence
What one is called to — vocation, charism, ministry, role-as-gift
forge_territory_proposed_per_BUILDING_BL.status: unprojected — forge-territory; candidate -klesis family from Greek

forge_territory_proposed_per_BUILDING_BL.description: Worshipping community as realm-region (ekklesia, sangha, umma)
forge_territory_proposed_per_BUILDING_BL.status: thinly-projected (mitakuyame is the lone entry) — forge-territory
unprojected — forge-territory; proskynance hinted in liturgy/session-001

forge_territory_proposed_per_BUILDING_BL.description: The aspects of grasping themselves as forge-targets (recognition, standing-in, application, revision, loss, sharing — the six moves of GRASPING.md)
forge_territory_proposed_per_BUILDING_BL.status: thinly-projected (noemame, sphotame proposed in NOEMA) — forge-territory
